name: calibre-mcp
description: FastMCP 2.14.4+ server for Calibre e-book library management. Features full webapp UI, AI chat, and natural language search via sampling.

sampling.notes: Used for natural language query parsing

ai_features.notes: Optional. Local LLM (Ollama) requires GPU (RTX 4070+ recommended for 70B models, 3060+ for 8B). CPU fallback available but slow.
